## Checklist

- [ ] Each file starts with a `# Topic Title` heading
- [ ] Official documentation is linked via a blockquote at the top of each file
- [ ] Code examples use fenced code blocks with the correct language identifier
- [ ] `manifest.json` updated if version information changed
- [ ] Spell-check passed
